issue_title: Fix CDN link for Material Design icons(5.0.45 -> 4.9.95)
issue_body_preview:
The latest version of the material icon is now causing a lot of bugs.(v5.0.45)
https://cdnjs.com/libraries/MaterialDesign-Webfont/5.0.45

Need to change to LTS specific version (v4.9.95)

Associated issue: [#10797](https://github.com/vuetifyjs/vuetify/issues/10797)
test_description_zh: 打开应用首页，观察页面中所有使用 Material Design Icons 的图标是否正常显示，检查是否有图标缺失、显示为方块/乱码或样式异常的情况。
expected_result_zh: 页面中所有 Material Design 图标均正常渲染显示，无图标缺失、空白方块、乱码或样式异常现象。
